title: fetch_session has no timeout; hangs indefinitely if server stalls
description: client.rs fetch_session(): call() sets a 30-second timeout via .timeout(Duration::from_secs(30)). fetch_session() issues self.http.get(...).send() with no timeout. If the server accepts the TCP connection but never sends a response, fetch_session blocks the calling async task forever. The inconsistency is especially sharp because call() (the follow-on method) does set a timeout.
